name: chemicaljs
description: Easily create your own web proxy with no experience required.
author: Nebelung

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile=./dist/index.js --format=esm --target=bun --sourcemap=linked && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile=./dist/index.cjs --format=cjs --target=bun --sourcemap=linked && bunx tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist && cp dist/index.d.ts dist/index.d.cts
